dvids.desc: Nimitz-class aircraft carrier USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN 72) conducts night flight operations during Operation Epic Fury, March 17, 2026. (U.S. Navy video)

dvids.desc: An F/A-18E Super Hornet, launches from the flight deck of Nimitz-class aircraft carrier USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN 72) during Operation Epic Fury, March 17, 2026. (U.S. Navy video)
